commits.author: Athos Ribeiro
commits.message:
Increase memory limits

  • Set JVM maximum heap size
  • Increase javadoc build max memory limit

This helps preventing build failures due to OOM errors in different platforms.

Signed-off-by: Athos Ribeiro athos.ribeiro@canonical.com
